content.title: Andrej Karpathy — Latest AI Education Video (2026-06-22)
content.summary: Andrej Karpathy's YouTube channel delivers in-depth educational content on deep learning, neural networks, and LLMs, with long-form tutorials that have become essential references for AI practitioners worldwide.
content.summary_1: Andrej Karpathy (former Tesla AI Director and OpenAI co-founder) runs a YouTube channel focused on deep learning education. His videos include multi-hour lecture series on neural networks from scratch, LLM internals, and the mathematics behind modern AI systems. The channel is known for its exceptional pedagogical depth and clarity. Key series include 'Neural Networks: Zero to Hero' (covering backpropagation, GPT from scratch, tokenization) and detailed explorations of transformer architecture and training dynamics. His videos attract millions of views and are widely recommended as the best self-study resource for understanding modern AI from first principles.
content.body_text: Andrej Karpathy's YouTube channel (youtube.com/@AndrejKarpathy) covers deep learning education including neural networks from scratch, GPT internals, tokenization, and LLM training. The channel is inactive for long stretches but each video is a high-quality multi-hour deep dive. Metadata collected via channel monitoring; exact video title for June 21-22 window requires web_search confirmation.

tech_insights.impact_summary: Karpathy's channel is among the highest-quality free resources for deep AI education—essential watching for anyone building LLM-based products or training custom models.
actions_developer: Watch Karpathy's 'Neural Networks: Zero to Hero' series for foundational understanding of transformer internals and training
Check channel for new tutorial uploads covering emerging topics in LLM training and scaling
actions_business: Use Karpathy videos in internal AI upskilling programs for engineering teams
Monitor channel releases for signals on important technical directions in LLM development
